strengths: Character caricatures are excellent and highly recognizable based on the descriptions (microphone, sunglasses/hat, long hair, beanie).
Successfully captures the 'Korean retro arcade' mood with appropriate background elements and color palette.
Dynamic and energetic atmosphere with combo effects.
issues: Violates the 'no text' constraint: The image includes a title banner and UI text (Hangul and English), which limits its usage as a pure icon asset.
Composition resembles a full title screen or screenshot rather than a centered, concise lobby icon.
Pixel art grid is slightly inconsistent (mix of resolutions), though it fits the casual aesthetic.
revisedPrompt: Create a clean pixel-art lobby icon featuring only the heads of 4 characters: a woman with a microphone, a man with sunglasses and a fedora, a man with long rock-star hair, and a man with a beanie and glasses. Arrange them in a tight, centered composition suitable for a small app icon. Background should be simple with abstract speed lines or sparks to imply a puzzle game. Strictly NO text, NO title banners, NO letters. 16-bit style, high contrast, warm retro Korean arcade colors.
